title: Spectro Snap
subtitle: A platform celebrating creativity through photography. Bringing optics and imagination together. Showcasing unique perspectives through the lens.
description:
Event: Spectro Snap 
 Objective of the Event: "Spectro Snap" an exhilarating online photography competition, is being organized by BVP Optica as part of the flagship event, Optical Invasion. This competition encourages participants to unleash their creativity and showcase their photographic prowess. Whether you are a seasoned photographer or a novice exploring your passion for capturing moments, "Spectro Snap" provides an ideal platform for you to display your skills and imagination.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Online photography competition under Optical Invasion.
Promoted the connection between optics and photography.
